# Dr Nicky Grant

> Cambridge PhD economist and specialist online tutor in economics, econometrics, mathematics, statistics, finance, TMUA and Oxbridge Economics applications. The website is primarily for students and parents seeking one-to-one online tuition.

## Primary Audiences

- [A-Level & Admissions](https://www.drnickygrant.com/a-level-admissions-tutoring.html): for school students and parents seeking A-Level Maths, Further Maths, A-Level Economics, TMUA and Oxbridge Economics preparation. The page includes an FAQ on subjects, exam boards, TMUA/Oxbridge support, safeguarding and pricing.
- [University & Postgraduate](https://www.drnickygrant.com/university-postgraduate-tutoring.html): for undergraduate, MSc, postgraduate and PhD students seeking support with economics, econometrics, statistics, finance, data methods, dissertations and research methods. The page includes an FAQ on levels and topics covered, deadlines, dissertation/PhD methodology and how rates are set.

## Main Tutoring Pages

- [A-Level Maths and Further Maths tutor](https://www.drnickygrant.com/a-level-maths-tutor.html): pure maths, statistics, mechanics, calculus, proof, exam technique and TMUA-style reasoning.
- [A-Level Economics tutor](https://www.drnickygrant.com/a-level-economics-tutor.html): microeconomics, macroeconomics, diagrams, essays, data response, evaluation and exam preparation.
- [TMUA preparation](https://www.drnickygrant.com/tmua-preparation.html): Paper 1, Paper 2, logic, proof, timing and mathematical reasoning for university applicants.
- [Oxbridge Economics tutor](https://www.drnickygrant.com/oxbridge-economics-tutor.html): interview preparation, personal statement content and economic reasoning.
- [University Economics tutor](https://www.drnickygrant.com/university-economics-tutor.html): undergraduate and postgraduate economics, mathematical economics, modules, exams and dissertations.
- [Econometrics tutor](https://www.drnickygrant.com/econometrics-tutor.html): OLS, IV, GMM, panel data, time series, statistics, empirical work, dissertations and PhD support.
- [Statistics tutor](https://www.drnickygrant.com/statistics-tutor.html): probability, hypothesis testing, regression, inference and data analysis.
- [Finance tutor](https://www.drnickygrant.com/finance-tutor.html): quantitative finance, asset pricing, financial econometrics, returns, risk and volatility.
- [Financial Econometrics tutor](https://www.drnickygrant.com/financial-econometrics-tutor.html): ARMA, GARCH, volatility, forecasting and empirical finance.
- [PhD Econometrics support](https://www.drnickygrant.com/phd-econometrics-tutor.html): identification, inference, GMM, IV, asymptotics, simulation and methods chapters.

## How Enquiries Work

- [How it works](https://www.drnickygrant.com/how-it-works.html): free consultation, session format, what to send and how pricing is confirmed.
- [Pricing](https://www.drnickygrant.com/pricing.html): A-Level Maths, Further Maths and Economics are GBP 75 per hour; TMUA and Oxbridge preparation are GBP 90 per hour; university and postgraduate rates are agreed at the free consultation.
- [Contact form](https://www.drnickygrant.com/#contact): asks for the type of support (A-Level & Admissions or University & Postgraduate), subject, level/course, deadline and a short message, with audience-specific prompts for school/admissions and university/postgraduate enquiries.

## Credentials And Background

- [Credentials, CV and academic background](https://www.drnickygrant.com/credentials.html): central page for qualifications, CV, academic profiles, research records and teaching materials.
- [About Dr Nicky Grant](https://www.drnickygrant.com/about.html): biographical and academic background.
- [Research and publications](https://www.drnickygrant.com/research.html): publication and seminar evidence, especially relevant for econometrics, finance, dissertation and PhD-level support.
- [Teaching materials](https://www.drnickygrant.com/teaching.html): public lecture notes, exercises, problem sheets and teaching resources.

Canonical person entity: `https://www.drnickygrant.com/#person`

External identity/profile signals:

- ORCID: https://orcid.org/0009-0008-8979-4623
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/nicky-lee-grant/

## Resources And Study Notes

- [Study notes and articles](https://www.drnickygrant.com/blog.html): free guides in economics, econometrics, maths, statistics and admissions.
- [Questions students and parents ask](https://www.drnickygrant.com/questions.html): common questions on admissions, subjects, methods and tuition practicalities.
- [Econometrics explained](https://www.drnickygrant.com/econometrics-explained.html): gateway page for econometrics definitions and study resources.
- [How to choose an economics or econometrics tutor](https://www.drnickygrant.com/choosing-an-economics-tutor.html): guidance on independent tutors, agencies, credentials, fit and pricing.

## Important Notes

- A-Level and admissions support is aimed at school students, parents and applicants. Relevant proof includes Cambridge economics qualifications, safeguarding training, enhanced DBS availability, secondary-school experience, A-Level/TMUA tutoring hours and admissions preparation.
- University and postgraduate support is aimed at module, problem-set, dissertation, software and methods work. Relevant proof includes Cambridge PhD training, former university lecturing, published econometrics research and public teaching materials.
- Some downloadable teaching PDFs and TeX files are historic teaching materials written for previous university teaching. They are included as evidence of teaching style and subject depth, not as current course content.
- Extended AI context is available at [llms-extended.txt](https://www.drnickygrant.com/llms-extended.txt).
